block_00: Forex basics that every trader needs to know
block_01: There are many traders that start without actually learning about the instrument and such an approach is not effective. When it comes to Forex, there are certain basics that everyone should understand. Learning these concepts may help you make market analysis-based decisions and advance your trading approach.
block_02: If you are still not sure what price deals open or close at, how to pick the currency to trade and analyze the market, this article is for you.
